data.name: Layout_Footer_Primary
data.value: Service for game inventories, item sales, purchases and delivery tracking.

data.name: Layout_Footer_Secondary
data.value: Steam inventory, listings and trade status in one workspace.

data.name: Home_HeroText
data.value: Buy, sell and track game items in a single service with clear inventory, balance and delivery flows.

data.name: Home_Workflow_Value
data.value: Steam sign-in, item listing, balance credit, purchase and delivery tracking

data.name: Home_Focus_Value
data.value: Fast item review, predictable actions and clear service states

data.name: Home_Overview_Description
data.value: Core service flows are available end-to-end for inventory management, selling and purchase tracking.

data.name: Home_Feature_Profile_Text
data.value: Sign in with Steam, manage your profile and keep trade details ready for item transfers.

data.name: Home_Feature_Inventory_Text
data.value: Review supported game inventories, create sale requests and monitor each item through its sale states.

data.name: Home_Feature_Market_Text
data.value: Available listings can be purchased with account balance and tracked through delivery progress.

data.name: Profile_Description
data.value: Manage your account details, current balance and Steam Trade URL in one place.

data.name: Profile_Subtitle_Fallback
data.value: Steam profile data is using fallback values.

data.name: Profile_Subtitle_Synced
data.value: Nickname and avatar synced from Steam.

data.name: Profile_TradeUrl_NotSet
data.value: Trade URL is not set yet.

data.name: Profile_TradeSettings_Description
data.value: Your Trade URL is required for bot intake and delivery flow.

data.name: Profile_LoginRequired_Text
data.value: Sign in with Steam to access your profile, balance and trading settings.

data.name: Inventory_Description
data.value: Review your game items, create sale requests and track sale processing states.

data.name: Inventory_LoginRequired_Text
data.value: Sign in with Steam to load your inventory and manage sale requests.

data.name: Inventory_Empty_Text
data.value: Steam did not return visible items for this account right now.

data.name: Inventory_YourItems_Description
data.value: Compact inventory list for quick review of item status, identifiers and next action.

data.name: Inventory_RecentSales_Description
data.value: Latest sell operations with current trade and credit statuses.

data.name: Inventory_RecentSales_Empty_Text
data.value: Create a sale from your inventory to start the service flow.

data.name: Market_Description
data.value: Browse credited items, spend account balance and track delivery progress for your purchases.

data.name: Market_BalanceSummary_Text
data.value: Current balance available for market purchases.

data.name: Market_Empty_Text
data.value: Credited items will appear here automatically after the sale flow is completed.

data.name: Market_AvailableItems_Text
data.value: All market offers that are currently open for purchase.

data.name: Market_Purchases_Text
data.value: Track purchased items, delivery statuses and delivery trade references.

data.name: Market_Purchases_Empty_Text
data.value: Purchased items will appear here together with delivery progress.

data.name: History_Description
data.value: Review sales, purchases and balance changes linked to your current account.

data.name: History_LoginRequired_Text
data.value: Sign in with Steam to view account activity history.

data.name: History_CurrentBalance_Text
data.value: Latest balance based on credited sales and market purchases.

data.name: History_Sales_Text
data.value: All sell operations connected to your Steam inventory items.

data.name: History_Sales_Empty_Text
data.value: Your sale requests will appear here once you start selling items.

data.name: History_Purchases_Text
data.value: Items you bought from the market and their delivery progress.

data.name: History_Purchases_Empty_Text
data.value: Items bought from the market will appear here.

data.name: History_Balance_Text
data.value: All balance credits and market purchase debits for your account.

data.name: History_Balance_Empty_Text
data.value: Credits and purchases will appear here once activity starts.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredSaleRequest
data.value: Steam login is required to create a sale request.

data.name: Message_TradeUrlRequiredSale
data.value: Trade URL must be set before creating a sale request.

data.name: Message_ItemAlreadyHasSaleOperation
data.value: This item already has a sale operation.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredBotIntake
data.value: Steam login is required to create bot intake.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredCreditBalance
data.value: Steam login is required to credit balance.

data.name: Message_TradeUrlNotSetInventoryStillLoads
data.value: Trade URL is not set yet. Inventory still loads by SteamID.

data.name: Message_SteamIdUnavailable
data.value: SteamID is not available for the current session.

data.name: Message_LocalUserProfileNotFound
data.value: Local user profile was not found.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredBuyMarketItems
data.value: Steam login is required to buy market items.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredCreateDeliveryTrade
data.value: Steam login is required to create delivery trade.

data.name: Message_LoginRequiredConfirmDelivery
data.value: Steam login is required to confirm delivery.

data.name: Message_TradeUrlMustBeValid
data.value: Trade URL must be a valid Steam trade offer link.

data.name: Message_SaleRequestAlreadyCredited
data.value: This sale request was already credited.

data.name: Message_OnlyTradeCreatedCanBeCredited
data.value: Only trade-created requests can be credited.

data.name: Message_TradeIntakeOnlyPending
data.value: Trade intake is available only for pending sale requests.

data.name: Message_BotIntegrationNotConfigured
data.value: Bot integration is not fully configured yet. Complete bot settings to enable real trade creation.

data.name: Message_OnlySoldItemsCanEnterDelivery
data.value: Only sold items can enter delivery flow.

data.name: Message_DeliveryTradeAlreadyExists
data.value: Delivery trade already exists for this item.

data.name: Message_BuyerTradeUrlRequired
data.value: Buyer Trade URL is required before delivery can start.

data.name: Message_DeliveryBotNotConfigured
data.value: Delivery bot integration is not fully configured yet. Complete bot settings to enable real delivery trade creation.

data.name: Message_ItemAlreadyMarkedDelivered
data.value: Item was already marked as delivered.

data.name: Message_OnlyDeliveryCreatedCanBeConfirmed
data.value: Only delivery-created items can be confirmed as delivered.

data.name: Message_MarketItemNoLongerAvailable
data.value: This item is no longer available.

data.name: Message_BuyOwnItemNotAllowed
data.value: Buying your own market item is not allowed.

data.name: Message_NotEnoughBalance
data.value: Not enough balance to buy this item.

data.name: Message_PurchaseCompletedPendingDelivery
data.value: Purchase completed. Item is pending delivery.

data.name: Message_SteamRateLimited
data.value: Steam is temporarily rate-limiting inventory requests. Please try again in a few minutes.

data.name: Message_SteamInventoryInvalid
data.value: Steam inventory response was empty or invalid.

data.name: Message_SteamInventoryUnavailable
data.value: Steam inventory is unavailable or private.

data.name: Message_SteamInventoryIncomplete
data.value: Steam inventory response is incomplete: assets were not returned.

data.name: Message_StubBotTradeCreated
data.value: Stub bot trade created. Real Steam bot integration is not connected yet.

data.name: Message_StubDeliveryTradeCreated
data.value: Stub delivery trade created. Real Steam delivery integration is not connected yet.
